A live snapshot of the kiroxy account pool — read it like a report, not a dashboard. Data refreshes every two seconds in place.

Pool

Every account in the vault, in order of last activity.

Loading pool snapshot…

Importing accounts

The dashboard import endpoint is on the v1.1 roadmap. Until then, add accounts from the command line — the CLI accepts the same JSON shape the dashboard eventually will: 

kiroxy import-json < tokens.json

See /dashboard, /dashboard-next, /dashboard-mansion, /dashboard-brutal for the other five variants.

kiroxy paper variant. Data from /dashboard/api/state, polled every two seconds. Typography: Newsreader (headings) and Inter Tight (body) — system fallbacks only, no CDN fetches.

References cited in .sisyphus/plans/variant-paper-manifesto.md: Stripe operator docs, The New York Times reading mode, Edward Tufte's tufte-css, The Economist data graphics.
